description:
This 20-question quiz evaluates foundational knowledge of core data structures and algorithmic efficiency, specifically focusing on time complexity analysis. It maintains a direct and encouraging teaching tone suitable for assessing intermediate-level computer science concepts.
Topics: Data Structures, Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithms, Time Complexity
Audience: Computer science students and software developers preparing for technical interviews.
